message: Clara Higgins (clara_003) is experiencing gait freezing and symptomatic hypotension. Clinical indicators suggest a negative correlation with recent Parkinson's medication initiation. Severity escalated to WARNING.
actions: Consult PCP regarding Carbidopa-Levodopa and Midodrine adjustment
correlation: 25.9% decline in gait speed and systolic hypotension (95/59 mmHg) correlate with recent initiation of Carbidopa-Levodopa for Parkinson's Disease. Potential interaction with existing Midodrine prescription.

message: HUMAN ESCALATION REQUESTED: Resident Clara Higgins (clara_003) is experiencing a high-risk decline in mobility (gait freezing) and significant systolic hypotension (95/59 mmHg) following the initiation of new medication. Immediate clinical review is required due to high fall risk.
